summary: Iteration 24: Complete E2E testing of BluBridge PDF Update features. All 25 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend flows work correctly. Key changes: Login credentials updated to 'Admin User'/'Admin User', Home page now has 8 buttons (added Set Holidays + Verify Applicant OTP), new public endpoints for registration and interview scheduling, enhanced job openings with new fields, hiring forms with job_description_attached field.

issues: FIXED: Updated default credentials hint from 'admin/admin' to 'Admin User/Admin User'

backend: POST /api/login - new credentials 'Admin User'/'Admin User' returns 200
POST /api/login - old credentials 'admin'/'admin' returns 401
GET /api/bb/holidays - returns list of holidays
POST /api/bb/holidays - creates new holiday
PUT /api/bb/holidays/{id} - updates holiday
DELETE /api/bb/holidays/{id} - removes holiday
POST /api/bb/verify-otp - returns Invalid OTP for wrong data
POST /api/bb/verify-otp - returns 400 for empty fields
GET /api/pub/form/{formId} - returns form without auth
GET /api/pub/form/{invalid} - returns 404
POST /api/pub/register - auto-shortlists when conditions met
POST /api/pub/register - rejects when age condition fails
POST /api/pub/register - rejects when location condition fails
GET /api/pub/schedule/{token} - returns applicant info and holidays
POST /api/pub/schedule/{token} - schedules interview and generates OTP
POST /api/pub/schedule/{token} - reschedules (increments reschedule_count)
GET /api/pub/schedule/{invalid} - returns 404
POST /api/bb/job-openings - creates with all new fields (vacancies, years_of_graduation, education, salary_range, key_responsibilities, added_advantages, what_we_offer)
POST /api/bb/hiring-forms - creates with job_description_attached and job_opening_id
GET /api/pub/form/{formId} - includes job_opening details when JD attached
GET /api/summary - existing endpoint works with new credentials
GET /api/applicants - existing endpoint works with new credentials
GET /api/attended - existing endpoint works with new credentials
GET /api/job-roles - existing endpoint works with new credentials
GET /api/bulk-upload/status - existing endpoint works with new credentials
frontend: Login with 'Admin User'/'Admin User' redirects to /home
/home shows 8 module buttons (Analytics Dashboard, Hiring Forms, Interview Schedule Reports, Update Applicants Scores, Create Job Roles, Create Job Openings, Set Holidays, Verify Applicant OTP)
/set-holidays page loads with Add Holiday button
/set-holidays - Add Holiday modal with name and date inputs works
/verify-otp page loads with phone and OTP inputs
/verify-otp - Verify button shows 'Invalid OTP !' for wrong data
/hiring-forms - 'Job description attached?' Yes/No radio buttons present in modal
/hiring-forms - Job opening dropdown appears when JD attached = Yes
/hiring-forms - Link icon button present on form cards
/job-openings modal has all new fields (Job Role, Title, Vacancies, Year of Graduation, Education, Salary Range, Key Responsibilities, Added Advantages, What We Offer)
/schedule-interview/:token has date/time inputs and Schedule button

critical_code_review_comments: Login credentials correctly changed from 'admin'/'admin' to 'Admin User'/'Admin User' in server.py line 266
Public endpoints (/api/pub/*) correctly do NOT require authentication
Auto-shortlisting logic in /api/pub/register correctly checks age, graduation year, location, and college conditions
Registration correctly inserts into both bb_registrations AND registered_candidates collections
Interview scheduling generates 6-digit OTP and stores in bb_registrations
OTP verification updates otp_verified in both bb_registrations and registered_candidates
Email/WhatsApp features are STUBBED (no messages sent) as expected
All new fields for job openings (vacancies, years_of_graduation, education, salary_range, key_responsibilities, added_advantages, what_we_offer) are properly stored and retrieved
Hiring forms correctly store job_description_attached and job_opening_id fields
seed_data_creation: Test data created via API with TEST_ prefix for holidays, job roles, form types, hiring forms, job openings, and registrations. All test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BluBridge PDF Update features fully tested and working. Key changes: (1) Login credentials changed to 'Admin User'/'Admin User', (2) Home page has 8 buttons including Set Holidays and Verify Applicant OTP, (3) Public endpoints /api/pub/form/{formId}, /api/pub/register, /api/pub/schedule/{token} work without auth, (4) Auto-shortlisting checks age, graduation year, location, and college conditions, (5) Registration inserts into both bb_registrations AND registered_candidates, (6) Interview scheduling generates 6-digit OTP, (7) OTP verification updates both collections, (8) Email/WhatsApp are STUBBED (no messages sent), (9) Job openings have new fields (vacancies, years_of_graduation, education, salary_range, key_responsibilities, added_advantages, what_we_offer), (10) Hiring forms have job_description_attached and job_opening_id fields.

mocked_apis.Email sending: STUBBED - status updates happen but no emails sent
mocked_apis.WhatsApp messaging: STUBBED - status updates happen but no messages sent
